highlights.description: Initial release of AX Spec - Agent Experience specification and CLI tools for building agent-friendly APIs
Spectral-compatible linting rules enforcing DIRECT principles across three compliance levels
CLI with lint, enrich, and gen commands for the complete AX workflow

added.description: `ax-spec lint` command wrapping vacuum for OpenAPI validation against AX rules
`ax-spec enrich` command for adding `x-ax-*` extensions via inference and API discovery
`ax-spec gen` command for generating Go code (errors, retry, capabilities, validation) from enriched specs
Spectral ruleset (`ax-openapi.json`) with rules for all DIRECT principles
Three compliance level profiles: L1 Structured, L2 Deterministic, L3 Agent-Ready
`pkg/gen` package for extracting AX metadata and generating typed Go code
`pkg/enrich` package for inferring `x-ax-*` extensions from OpenAPI structure
API discovery feature to probe live APIs for undocumented error codes
Real-world OpenAPI examples: Opik (201 endpoints), ElevenLabs (204 endpoints)
Generated Go code samples for Opik and ElevenLabs SDKs

documentation.description: MkDocs site with getting started guides, extension reference, and rules documentation
Case studies documenting AX integration in elevenlabs-go and opik-go SDKs
Case study template for documenting new integrations
TASKS.md with experiment plan for measuring AX benefits quantitatively

infrastructure.description: GitHub Actions CI workflows for build, lint, and test
